notes: All economy tuning lives here. Never hardcode these in engine code. Final magic numbers are outputs of the balance-report skill, not authored by hand.

rent.note: d is 1-indexed. growth=1.53 lands rent_8 ~= 750 (25*1.53^8), matching the intended LBAL-like 25->~750 climb; 1.7 was a spec error that overshot to ~1744. Phase 5: replace scalar `growth` with the `growthPerDeadline` vector so rent can bend sub-geometric after d6 (see GAME_DESIGN #R-E3). Calibrate the p25 (not mean) of Monte-Carlo spins vs rent_d.

guardrail.note: gap = ownCount - sharedCount. <=2 normal; 3-4 soft ramp (one draft slot -> donate-to-shared, own odds *= (1 - dilutionPerGap*(gap-2))); ==5 hard lock personal draft to shared.
